10,000+ followers · 2,000,000+ views

That’s your first real win in Japanese.

After this, you’ll know hiragana, katakana, and 400+ Japanese words.

Before grammar, learn words. Every word has an image — selected and verified by native speakers. Nouns, adjectives, and hiragana & katakana come with slideshow videos with audio. Verbs come with videos of the actual action.

Abstract words like "meaning" or "reason" are not included. This is a visual guide — every word needs to be learnable through images and sound, stress-free. Your brain remembers pictures far better than text (Paivio, 1971).

No romaji.

"But how do I read it?" — Listen with your ears. Start with hiragana and katakana. The charts include audio and romaji as a guide to get you started. Once you know the scripts, you don't need romaji for vocabulary. Every word's video has audio — you hear it before you even think about spelling it out (Okuyama, 2007).

Built by native speakers, powered by AI.

This product couldn’t exist without AI. Every one of the 400+ words has its own image and video with audio. Putting all of that together at this scale was never possible before. And because it’s AI-powered, we can keep improving it faster than anyone. We’re proud of how we built this.

Not happy with an image? DM us.

If any image feels unclear or hard to remember, DM us on Instagram. We'll change it. This product is built around one thing: making words easy to remember.
